operations.source_quote: First, we perform an insertion at the head by adding the number 30
then another insertion at the head with 20
To see what we have, we perform a traversal , starting at the head and visiting each node in order until we reach the end.
Next, we execute a deletion at the tail ; the pointer from 20 is updated to null, dropping 30 and leaving us with 10, 20 .
We then perform an insertion at the tail by adding 40
Finally, we perform a deletion by value for the number 20 .
